/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 23: missing EOF at 'annex': Nested annex blocks are not allowed. -> Remove the second 'annex agree {' block.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 26: no viable alternative at character '@': The '@' symbol is not valid in this context. It is likely a syntax error related to the temporal operator. -> Remove the '@' symbol.

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 25: left and right sides of binary expression '>' are of type 'real' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in comparison -> Cast `time` to `int`
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 28: missing EOF at '}': Syntax error: missing closing brace -> Add missing closing brace '}'

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 25: no viable alternative at input 'int': Invalid use of 'int' in temporal expression. -> Remove 'int(' from 'int(time) > pre(mode)'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 28: missing EOF at '}': Unclosed annex block. -> Add a closing '}' to the annex agree block.

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 25: left and right sides of binary expression '>' are of type 'real' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in comparison -> Change 'time > pre(mode)' to 'real(time) > pre(mode)'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 28: missing EOF at '}': Syntax error: Unclosed annex block -> Add a closing '}' after the annex agree block

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 25: Argument of real cast is of type 'real' but must be of type 'int': Incorrect type cast in temporal expression. -> Remove the `real()` cast from `real(time)`.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 25: left and right sides of binary expression '>' are of type 'real' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in comparison. -> Remove the `real()` cast from `real(time)`.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 28: missing EOF at '}': Syntax error: Unmatched closing brace. -> Remove the extra closing brace '}'.
